description: Story A (shared preamble). R4 -- front-load + three measurement views + durability, as preamble success criteria. Mirror + re-stamp + parity.
acceptance_criteria: A freshly generated plan states a baseline positioned before its actions -- an adversarial reviewer confirms presence and ordering.
Its measurement names all three points of view (student outcomes, staff/adult practice, parent/stakeholder) -- each present.
At least one measurement is a later/delayed re-check distinct from a one-time occurrence -- an adversarial reviewer confirms at least one.
The measurement content scans to zero process-method terms; the dispatched output parses clean.
